vc_checking.summary: The structural entailment witness is proofable by unfolding xizi_dll, but both return witnesses are semantically unprovable as generated: their preconditions own the complete ring resources at linklist while their postconditions require xizi_dll at an unrelated universally quantified linklist_pre, with no equality connecting the two addresses.

diagnostic_confirmation: xizi_double_link_empty_return_wit_1_split_goal_spatial isolates exactly P(linklist) |-- xizi_dll linklist_pre l
xizi_double_link_empty_return_wit_2_split_goal_spatial isolates exactly P(linklist) |-- xizi_dll linklist_pre l
failure_evidence.countermodel_outline: Choose linklist_pre distinct from linklist and a heap satisfying the sentinel fields plus xizi_dllseg at linklist. The precondition owns no fields at linklist_pre, but xizi_dll linklist_pre l requires both sentinel field cells at linklist_pre, so the postcondition cannot be constructed.

annotation_repair.required_property: Preserve the identity of the C parameter across the structural Assert, so generated return VCs contain linklist = linklist_pre (or avoid introducing a fresh unconstrained current-address variable) while retaining the same recursive xizi_dllseg resources.
annotation_repair.suggested_scope: Revise the intermediate C Assert in annotation-filling/annotation-checking, rerun canonical symbolic execution and diagnostics splitting, then create a fresh vc-checking round bound to the new source_goal_version.
must_not_change: the recursive xizi_dll/xizi_dllseg semantics merely to hide the missing address equality
generated files outside canonical symbolic execution

post_spatial: xizi_dllseg first linklist_pre linklist_pre last l

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: Use the first and last existential witnesses already packaged by xizi_dll.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Select either identical disjunct, unfold xizi_dll once, expose its two existentials, and return the three framed conjuncts unchanged.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: No pure postcondition; PreH1 is unused.

used_existing_lemmas.statement_shape: xizi_dll head nodes is existential ownership of the two sentinel fields and xizi_dllseg
used_existing_lemmas.premise_discharge: The sole spatial premise is exactly xizi_dll linklist_pre l.

witness_analyses.grouping_reason: Shares the same predicate unfold/repack core that the repaired return witnesses will use.

pre_spatial: xizi_dllseg first linklist linklist last l
post_exists: the first/last witnesses hidden by xizi_dll

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: After repair, instantiate xizi_dll with the existing first and last; currently this would build xizi_dll linklist l, not xizi_dll linklist_pre l.
witness_analyses.space_plan: The resources can be repackaged only at linklist. No premise or safe existential instantiation transports exclusive sentinel cells to arbitrary linklist_pre.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: Unfold xizi_dllseg by cases on l. The nil case yields first = linklist, contradicting PreH1; hence l <> nil and the return-0 implication follows.

used_existing_lemmas.statement_shape: the nil branch entails first = linklist and emp
used_existing_lemmas.premise_discharge: The precondition provides xizi_dllseg first linklist linklist last l and first <> linklist.

witness_analyses.premise_discharge_failure: No premise establishes linklist = linklist_pre or supplies sentinel resources at linklist_pre.
witness_analyses.failure_signal: postcondition shape resource is rooted at an unrelated address
witness_analyses.grouping_reason: Excluded from proving groups until annotation regeneration fixes address identity.

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: After repair, instantiate xizi_dll with the existing first and last; currently this still constructs at linklist rather than linklist_pre.
witness_analyses.space_plan: The existing sentinel fields and segment repackage at linklist only; the universally quantified linklist_pre has no owned cells.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: Case-analyze l. If l is nonempty, xizi_dllseg begins with node_store at first = linklist, which overlaps the already-owned sentinel next/prev cells under separating conjunction; exclusivity rules out that branch, leaving l = nil.

used_existing_lemmas.premise_discharge: The precondition supplies both sentinel mapsto resources, the segment, and first = linklist.
